title: Smoove Turrell Live Support
description: Get ready for an unforgettable night of soul power and killer grooves as Smoove & Turrell bring their explosive live show to the Fringe. Fusing northern funk, vintage soul and funky beats, this band have built a reputation for electric performances with the incredible vocals of John Turrell always front and centre. From deep, heartfelt soul ballads to floor-filling funk anthems, Smoove & Turrell deliver a set packed with fan favourites and fresh cuts alike. Their chemistry is undeniable, their sound is timeless yet modern, and their live band brings an intensity that records simply can’t contain.

venue.name: Klub Kaput at Caravanserai
venue.address: North of St Peter's Church, York Place, East Sussex
